/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/MyMusicPlayer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/mycomponet/PlaylistItem.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/mycomponet/SongItem.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/services/library_service.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/widgets/all_music_page.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/widgets/home_window.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/widgets/playlist_page.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/widgets/player_bar.cc.o CMakeFiles/MyMusicPlayer.dir/src/widgets/scan_page.cc.o -o MyMusicPlayer  /usr/lib64/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.3 _deps/creeper-qt-local/libcreeper-qt-widgets.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3
